UNESCO UIS: SDG 4 Education Monitoring
description: SDG 4 global education indicators: enrollment, completion, learning outcomes, equity, financing. Approximately 800 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: Enrollment & Participation
description: Gross/net enrollment ratios, attendance rates, out-of-school children by level and sex. Approximately 600 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: Completion & Transition
description: Completion rates, survival rates, transition rates between education levels. Approximately 400 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: Literacy
description: Youth and adult literacy rates by sex and age group. Approximately 200 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: Teachers
description: Pupil-teacher ratios, trained teachers, teacher qualifications. Approximately 300 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: Finance
description: Government expenditure on education, spending per student, share of GDP. Approximately 400 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: Learning Outcomes
description: Minimum proficiency in reading and math, by sex, location, wealth. Approximately 500 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: ICT in Education
description: ICT skills, computer access, internet access in schools. Approximately 200 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: Tertiary
description: Tertiary enrollment, graduation, ISCED field of study, mobility. Approximately 400 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: Pre-primary & ECCE
description: Early childhood care and education participation rates. Approximately 300 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education: Other Policy Indicators
description: Additional education policy indicators not in SDG4 framework. Approximately 1067 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Science: R&D Expenditure & Personnel
description: Gross domestic expenditure on R&D (GERD), researchers, technicians per million inhabitants. Approximately 12 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Culture: Heritage & Museums
description: World Heritage sites, cultural employment, cultural trade, museum visits. Approximately 31 indicators.

name: UNESCO UIS: Demographic & Socio-Economic
description: Population data from external sources used as denominators. Approximately 35 indicators.
